violations.text: (Sweet chili half chicken) was observed held at (129) degrees Fahrenheit. TCS foods were held out of temp. less than 4 hours prior to inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated chicken to 165 degrees Fahrenheit at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

(Chicken Tenders and clam chowder soup) were observed held at (120-125) degrees Fahrenheit. TCS foods were held out of temp. less than 4 hours prior to inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated chicken to 199 degrees Fahrenheit and reheated soup to 165 degrees Fahrenheit at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

Observed prep sink with an air-break located in seafood cold room area. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The establishment is using time for its pizza slices. Establishment is not maintaining adequate records for slices (no records of disposal in the month of February.) New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an bio-film. Ice machine will be emptied and washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025
